title: Sandwīp Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sandwīp with a Z-Score of +3.20. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sandwīp is causing significant discomfort with an Umidita of 85% and Vento of 9.5 km/h. 
 The high temperatures are resulting in a CDD of 10.2 GG, indicating a substantial cooling demand. 
 The situation is critical, with a Level of CRITICAL and no heating degree days, as indicated by an HDD of 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
